fact_nuggets.text: Sand Rush (Japanese: Sand Paddle) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI In the Sandstorm weather condition, it can use a move 2 times at once for only 1 PP. * When the Pokemon uses a move in the Sandstorm weather condition, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! * S MD The Pokemon isn't damaged by a sandstorm. During a sandstorm, it uses a move 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the Speed stat of Pokemon with this Ability is doubled. A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] There are no effects outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the Speed stat of Pokemon with this Ability is doubled. A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would.
Doubles Speed during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.
